title: fragaria collina var. calycina
intro: Fragaria collina var. calycina, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Fragaria collina var. calycina include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and cardiovascular disease. Fragaria collina var. calycina can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
